name: thesis-format-fixer
description: Agent plugin for DOCX thesis formatting repair, validation reports, and manual-fix checklists.

interface.shortDescription: Repair DOCX thesis formatting with reports.
interface.longDescription: A skill-first agent plugin that runs deterministic DOCX thesis format repair, produces validation reports, and keeps LLMs limited to structure labels and explanations.
defaultPrompt: Repair this DOCX thesis format and report remaining manual fixes.
Validate this thesis against the SWUFE master profile.
Run Open XML thesis repair without changing thesis content.
